channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-22 21:19 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: my brain can’t process this information
item.description: my brain can’t process this information

item.title: @elonmusk: Happy Birthday Giga Berlin! 4 years ago, we started production with delivering the first 30 cars to ...
item.description: Happy Birthday Giga Berlin! 4 years ago, we started production with delivering the first 30 cars to our customers! Since then, it has been a unique success story: - produced and delivered more than 700.000 Model Y 💪🏼 - created nearly 11.000 jobs 👷‍♂️👩‍🔧 So much more to come!

item.title: @elonmusk: Engineers in the factory - essential to Elon’s vision. “In a single building, we can create a mask, ...
item.description: Engineers in the factory - essential to Elon’s vision. “In a single building, we can create a mask, make the chip, test the chip, make another mask, and have a fast recursive loop for improving the chip design. … Try wild and crazy things, which you can do if you've got that fast iteration loop … to make it, test it and then change the design." His sense of how to make innovation quick, efficient, speedy, effective, and fast is so far ahead. Also rapid. Shorten the iteration loop. Remove roadblocks.

item.title: @elonmusk: BREAKING: "CONNECTORS" WILL COME TO GROK! 🚀 It'll let you connect services like PayPal, Stripe, GitH...
item.description: BREAKING: "CONNECTORS" WILL COME TO GROK! 🚀 It'll let you connect services like PayPal, Stripe, GitHub, Slack, Crypto, AWS, and... to Grok! 🔥 Below is a list of them! 👇

item.title: @elonmusk: A drug-addicted parasite stole a gun, walked up to a random pregnant woman in Seattle, and murdered ...
item.description: A drug-addicted parasite stole a gun, walked up to a random pregnant woman in Seattle, and murdered her. Instead of just executing him, the state wasted three years “evaluating” him before reaching a plea deal acquitting him for “insanity,” so now millions of dollars can be spent “rehabilitating” him so that later left-wing activists can work for his release in the hopes he will get to do more drugs and kill somebody again.

item.title: @elonmusk: At 24 years old, SpaceX is already one of the largest & most *capital-efficient* companies ever buil...
item.description: At 24 years old, SpaceX is already one of the largest & most *capital-efficient* companies ever built: SpaceX: ~$12B raised → $1.25T Val (target $1.75T IPO) OpenAI: ~$170B raised → $840B Val (target $1T IPO) SpaceX Financial Profile (Over 1 Year): 2025: $350B → 2026: $1.25T Valuation March 2025: $350B val, SpaceX had raised only ~$10B over 23 years, remarkably modest for its scale & valuation, +was already cash flow positive FY 2025: Generated about $8 billion in profit on $15-$16B of revenue, driven primarily by@Starlink's satellite internet service, which accounts for between 50% - 80% of total revenue (Reuters) February 2, 2026: $1.25T valuation, all-stock acquisition of xAI. Deal valued standalone SpaceX at ~$1 trillion & xAI at $250 billion. Widely reported as the largest M&A transaction in history. March 2026:@elonmuskannounces SpaceXAI + Tesla TERAFAB Project, goal to reach a trillion watts of compute/year 2026: Targeting ~$1.75 trillion IPO Note:@xai(now part of@SpaceX) has reportedly raised ~$42B total (PitchBook). Combined, that’s ~$54B total capital against a ~$1.25T valuation. Figures based on recent public reporting; estimates may vary. Christian Garrett (@CGarrett_15) of@137ventures

item.title: @elonmusk: Tonight Cybertruck powered these massive laser beams pointed into space for the Terafab event in Aus...
item.description: Tonight Cybertruck powered these massive laser beams pointed into space for the Terafab event in Austin, Texas. Great pics@AdanGuajardo🔥

item.title: @elonmusk: The Cherry Blossoms are in ELONgation! 🌸
item.description: The Cherry Blossoms are in ELONgation! 🌸

item.title: @elonmusk: The Iron Law: "The expected value of any net impact assessment of any large-scale social program is ...
item.description: The Iron Law: "The expected value of any net impact assessment of any large-scale social program is zero." The Stainless Steel Law: "The better designed the impact assessment of a social program, the more likely is the resulting estimate of net impact to be zero." This is from an expert who desperately wanted the conclusion to be the opposite. But the impact is never zero. It's always, actually negative. Because the money taken from taxpayers at gunpoint and spent on these programs is wasted. The effect is value destruction.

item.title: @elonmusk: Another 29 sats added to the 10k active
item.description: Another 29 sats added to the 10k active

item.title: @elonmusk: This is the reason federalism is so important. Individual states can become tyrannical but America s...
item.description: This is the reason federalism is so important. Individual states can become tyrannical but America still has an escape hatch that ensures the future of the whole country. If federalism fails, America does too. We must protect Texas and Florida with all our being.

item.title: @elonmusk: Absolutely. The judges responsible for repeatedly releasing violent criminals who commit horrific cr...
item.description: Absolutely. The judges responsible for repeatedly releasing violent criminals who commit horrific crimes must be impeached.

item.title: @elonmusk: Unless we have photo ID, elections are obviously subject to massive unprovable fraud
item.description: Unless we have photo ID, elections are obviously subject to massive unprovable fraud

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceXAI + Tesla TERAFAB Project Goal is a trillion watts of compute/year Most must necessarily go t...
item.description: SpaceXAI + Tesla TERAFAB Project Goal is a trillion watts of compute/year Most must necessarily go to space, as US electricity is only 0.5TW
